duas.arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
duas.transliteration: Asbahna wa asbahal mulku lillah, walhamdu lillah, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul mulku walahul hamdu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir.
duas.translation: We have reached the morning and at this very time all sovereignty belongs to Allah. All praise is for Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without any partner. To Him belongs the sovereignty and to him is the praise, and He is over all things omnipotent.

duas.arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
duas.transliteration: Amsayna wa amsal mulku lillah, walhamdu lillah, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah.
duas.translation: We have reached the evening and at this very time all sovereignty belongs to Allah. All praise is for Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without any partner.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا وَبِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا وَبِكَ نَحْيَا وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma bika asbahna, wa bika amsayna, wa bika nahya, wa bika namutu wa ilaikan nushur.
duas.translation: O Allah, by You we enter the morning and by You we enter the evening, by You we live and by You we die, and to You is the resurrection.

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah.
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.

duas.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
duas.transliteration: Ashhadu an la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lahu wa ashhadu anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa rasuluh.
duas.translation: I bear witness that there is no deity worthy of worship except Allah alone with no partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and messenger.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ هَٰذِهِ الدَّعْوَةِ التَّامَّةِ وَالصَّلَاةِ الْقَائِمَةِ آتِ مُحَمَّدًا الْوَسِيلَةَ وَالْفَضِيلَةَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma Rabba hadhihid da'watit tammah, wasalatil qa'imah, ati Muhammadanil wasilata wal-fadilah.
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of this perfect call and the prayer to be offered, grant Muhammad the privilege and also the eminence.

duas.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
duas.transliteration: Bismika Allahumma amutu wa ahya.
duas.translation: In Your name O Allah, I die and I live.

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin nushur.
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after having taken it from us and unto Him is the resurrection.

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah.
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنَا وَسَقَانَا وَجَعَلَنَا مُسْلِمِينَ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi at'amana wa saqana wa ja'alana muslimin.
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who fed us and gave us drink and made us Muslims.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ وَأَنَا عَلَىٰ عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma anta Rabbi la ilaha illa anta, Khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mastata'tu, A'udhu bika min sharri ma sana'tu, Abu'u laka bini'matika 'alayya, wa abu'u laka bidhanbi faghfir li, fa'innahu la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa ant.
duas.translation: O Allah, You are my Lord, there is none worthy of worship but You. You created me and I am your servant, and I am trying my best to keep my covenant and promise to you. I seek refuge in you from the evil which I have done. I acknowledge your favor upon me and I acknowledge my sin, so forgive me, for there is none who forgives sin except You.

duas.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ الْعَظِيمَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
duas.transliteration: Astaghfirullahil-'Azeemal-ladhi la ilaha illa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyumu wa atubu ilayh.
duas.translation: I seek the forgiveness of Allah the Mighty, Whom there is none worthy of worship except Him, the Living, the Eternal, and I repent to Him.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ لَّهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
duas.transliteration: Allahu la ilaha illa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyum. La ta'khudhuhu sinatun wa la nawm. Lahu ma fis-samawati wa ma fil-ard.
duas.translation: Allah - there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth.

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahil-ladhi la yadurru ma'asmihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i, wa Huwas-Sami'ul-'Alim.
duas.translation: In the name of Allah with Whose name nothing can harm on earth or in the heavens, and He is the All-Hearing, All-Knowing.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَىٰ ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma a'inni 'ala dhikrika wa shukrika wa husni 'ibadatik.
duas.translation: O Allah, help me to remember You, to give You thanks, and to worship You in the best manner.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي فِيمَنْ هَدَيْتَ وَعَافِنِي فِيمَنْ عَافَيْتَ وَتَوَلَّنِي فِيمَنْ تَوَلَّيْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-hdinifi man hadayt, wa 'afini fiman 'afayt, wa tawallani fiman tawallayt.
duas.translation: O Allah guide me among those You have guided, pardon me among those You have pardoned, befriend me among those You have befriended.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ وَإِنَّا إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا لَمُنقَلِبُونَ اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ فِي سَفَرِنَا هَٰذَا الْبِرَّ وَالتَّقْوَىٰ
duas.transliteration: Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar. Subhanaladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinin, wa inna ila Rabbina lamunqalibun...
duas.translation: Allah is the greatest, Allah is the greatest, Allah is the greatest. How perfect He is, the One Who has placed this (transport) at our service, and we ourselves would not have been capable of that. And to our Lord is our final destiny.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ النَّاسِ أَذْهِبِ الْبَأْسَ اشْفِ أَنْتَ الشَّافِي لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma Rabban-nas, adh-hibil ba's, washfi antash-shafi, la shifa'a illa shifa'uk, shifa'an la yughadiru saqama.
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of mankind, remove the affliction and send down cure and healing, for no one can cure but You; so cure in such a way that no trace of illness remains.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-ftah li abwaba rahmatik.
duas.translation: O Allah, open the gates of Your mercy for me.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka min fadlik.
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You from Your favour.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيمَا رَزَقْتَنَا وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma barik lana fima razaqtana wa qina 'adhaban-nar.
duas.translation: O Allah, bless what You have provided us with, and protect us from the punishment of the fire.

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Subhanallah.
duas.translation: Glory be to Allah.

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdulillah.
duas.translation: All praise is due to Allah.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
duas.transliteration: Allahu Akbar.
duas.translation: Allah is the greatest.

duas.arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallah.
duas.translation: There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ الْمَوْلِجِ وَخَيْرَ الْمَخْرَجِ بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا وَعَلَى اللَّهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka khayral-mawliji wa khayral-makhraj. Bismillahi walajna, wa bismillahi kharajna, wa 'alallahi rabbina tawakkalna.
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for the blessing of entering and the blessing of leaving. In Allah's name we enter, and in Allah's name we leave, and upon Allah our Lord we place our trust.

duas.arabic: رَّبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
duas.transliteration: Rabbi zidni 'ilma.
duas.translation: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.

duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu billahi minash-shaytanir-rajim.
duas.translation: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Shaytan.
